name: damaged
body:
Hi {{ticket.requester.first_name}}, 

Thank you for your message, we are sorry to hear that your order has been damaged in transit. 

We will send you a return label immediately. Please could you send us photos of the packaging and the device to help us claim with the courier. As soon as we receive your device, we will refund your order. 

We will resolve this as quickly as possible. 

Kind regards, 
Mac Group Customer Service
